channel.title: NRIBeat — Daily Pulse for Indian Americans
channel.description: Immigration, AI, Cricket, Bollywood, and Layoffs — curated daily for the Indian-American community.

item.title: Ananya Panday's 'Pressure Ko Bolo Bye' Campaign 2025
item.description: Ananya Panday and Nick India have launched 'Pressure Ko Bolo Bye,' a mental health campaign helping Indian families manage exam stress through playful, open conversations. Available free on YouTube and via Disney+ Hotstar, it's a meaningful departure from traditional Bollywood content, directly addressing the pressure many Indian students and parents face during exam season.

item.title: Love & War 2026: Bhansali's Strict Security on Ranbir-Alia Set
item.description: Sanjay Leela Bhansali is keeping Love & War under extreme security with no-phones policies on set. The 2026 film starring Ranbir Kapoor, Alia Bhatt, and Vicky Kaushal is one of Bollywood's most anticipated projects. Expect a theatrical release with OTT arrival 6-8 weeks later.

item.title: EB-2 India May 2026 Visa Bulletin Prediction: Expect Modest Forward Movement
item.description: EB-2 India is expected to move 14-18 days forward in May 2026, bringing the Final Action Date to approximately July 29–August 2, 2026. Retrogression risk remains very low at 8%, with the real danger zone emerging in July-September 2026.

item.title: Bumrah & Mumbai Indians Stunned by Sooryavanshi in IPL 2025
item.description: Yashasvi Jaiswal and Vaibhav Sooryavanshi smashed Mumbai Indians in IPL 2025, leaving even Bumrah rattled in Guwahati. This match proves India's young batting talent is ready for the biggest stages. Here's how to watch India cricket highlights from the US.

item.title: Molineux Captaincy Call: T20 World Cup Will Be the Real Test
item.description: Molineux's captaincy is a high-stakes gamble that will be validated or questioned based solely on T20 World Cup results. Selector Flegler backs him despite injury concerns, confirming his bowling return is on schedule. For Indian cricket fans tracking 2026's biggest moments, this is a captaincy story that'll define the entire tournament cycle.

item.title: AI Tools for Developers 2026: Top ChatGPT Alternatives
item.description: The AI tools landscape for developers has matured in 2026. ChatGPT alternatives like Claude, Cursor, and Copilot X now dominate specialized workflows. Indian engineers proficient with 3+ AI tools report 12-18% higher salaries and faster promotions. Learning these tools is measurable career leverage.

item.title: Cameron Green Set to Bowl in KKR vs LSG IPL 2026 Match
item.description: Cameron Green is finally bowling again for KKR in IPL 2026 against LSG on Thursday. This is huge for KKR's squad balance, which has been damaged by injuries all season. Green's return as a dual-threat all-rounder could be the turning point the team needs. US-based fans can catch the action on Willow TV or Sling TV.

item.title: April 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date Holds Steady to July 15, 2014
item.description: April 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date holds steady to July 15, 2014; EB-3 India to November 15, 2013. Dates for Filing: EB-2 January 15, 2015, EB-3 January 15, 2015. No movement this month — monitor the next bulletin closely.

item.title: How to Scale AI Projects from Pilot to Production in 2025 [2026]
item.description: Most enterprise AI projects fail not because of bad tools, but because companies let pilots sprawl without discipline or production timelines. MassMutual and Mass General Brigham achieved 30% productivity gains and cut help desk resolution from 11 to 1 minute by standardizing tools, defining metrics, and deploying to production—not extending pilots forever. For Indian software engineers, this signals demand for engineers who can move AI from chaos to production, which directly impacts compensation and career growth in 2025.

item.title: OpenAI Alums Launch $100M AI Fund: What It Means for Your Career [2026]
item.description: OpenAI alums just launched a $100M fund (Zero Shot) backing the next generation of AI tools. For Indian tech professionals in the US, this means early signals about which AI platforms will dominate, which companies will hire aggressively, and which skills will command salary premiums in 2026.

item.title: Salman Khan's Maatrubhumi Delayed to June 2026 Release
item.description: Salman Khan's war drama Maatrubhumi is now releasing in June 2026 instead of May after being reimagined from a factual retelling to a fictionalized narrative. The film will hit US theaters first, then stream on platforms like Disney+ Hotstar, Prime Video, or Netflix within weeks. It's shaping up to be one of the biggest new Bollywood releases of summer 2026.

item.title: EB-2 India May 2026 Visa Bulletin Prediction: Expect Modest Forward Movement
item.description: EB-2 India is expected to advance 12-18 days in May 2026, moving the Final Action Date from July 15 to approximately July 27-August 2, 2014. Retrogression risk remains minimal due to timing within the fiscal year, though applicants should monitor for July-September pressure.

item.title: Aaron Green IPL 2025: Why KKR Must Stick With Star Batter
item.description: Aaron Green, IPL's most expensive overseas player, is struggling early in the 2025 season, but Aaron Finch warns KKR not to lose faith by dropping him in the order. Patience, not panic, is the smart play for teams and their overseas stars.

item.title: Bumrah vs Sooryavanshi: RR Chase Top Spot in IPL 2025
item.description: Rajasthan Royals are eyeing the IPL 2025 table top as they clash with Mumbai Indians in a high-stakes encounter featuring the battle between Sooryavanshi and Bumrah. With Hardik Pandya returning to MI, this match will decide playoff momentum. US-based cricket fans can catch live coverage on Willow TV and streaming platforms.

item.title: IPL 2026: Rizvi Orange Cap, Bishnoi Purple Cap Race
item.description: Yashasvi Rizvi leads the Orange Cap race in IPL 2026 after 12 games, while Yuzvendra Bishnoi holds the Purple Cap as the leading wicket-taker. Both players are in brilliant form with consistent performances that could impact ICC Champions Trophy 2025 selections. Here's your guide to watching India cricket from the US and staying updated on live scores.

item.title: CSK's Brevis Injury Update: Will He Play Delhi Capitals?
item.description: CSK's Ryan Brevis is expected to be fit for the Delhi Capitals match after missing IPL 2026's opening three games. This is a significant boost for CSK's middle-order depth and tournament ambitions. US fans can catch all the action via Willow TV or YouTube highlights.

item.title: AI Semiconductor Boom: What It Means for Your Tech Career in 2026
item.description: Goldman Sachs projects sharp semiconductor revenue growth through 2026 driven by AI demand, creating urgent hiring in GPU optimization, MLOps, and AI infrastructure roles. Indian engineers who specialize in these areas will see 20-40% salary premiums—but only if they position themselves now. The window for career pivots is open through mid-2026.

item.title: Jackie Shroff & Suniel Shetty Team Up? 2025 Bollywood News
item.description: Jackie Shroff and Suniel Shetty just posted a cryptic WhatsApp-style reel hinting at a major collaboration, sparking wild speculation among fans. No official details yet, but it's likely a film or OTT series announcement coming soon. We'll update you the moment it's confirmed.

item.title: RCB Crushes CSK: Tim David & Rajat Patidar's IPL 2025 Masterclass
item.description: RCB dismantled CSK with a record-breaking 250/3—the highest score ever against Chennai in IPL history. Tim David and Rajat Patidar led a brutal batting assault that left CSK helpless. If you missed the 1:30 AM US broadcast, catch the full highlights on Willow TV or YouTube next morning.

item.title: Grok AI Prompt Generator: Best AI Tool for 2026
item.description: Grok AI now auto-generates detailed prompts for image and video creation, making visual content generation 2-3x faster. For Indian engineers in the US, this is a productivity lever that affects portfolio building, side projects, and machine learning salary conversations. It's also a real alternative to ChatGPT for creative workflow automation in 2026.
